Risk Description:
Training data encodes historical hiring 
discrimination against women in technical roles
Mitigation Control:
Conduct regular bias audits using disaggregated metrics 
across protected characteristics;
 retrain the model on balanced datasets 
perform disparate impact testing before deployment.

Risk Description:
Candidates cannot understand why they were rejected;
 the scoring algorithm is not explainable
Mitigation Control:
Provide candidates with meaningful explanations of how their
 applications were assessed; publish a summary of the system's 
decision logic; maintain human oversight for hiring decisions.

Risk Description:
Processes sensitive personal data
 without adequate data minimization

System may not generalize across job types or
 candidate populations

Incorrect rejections at scale systematically
 exclude qualified candidates
